label: frontier • reproduce a crash, read the traceback, fix it
query: Running 'python3 app.py' in this folder crashes. Reproduce the crash yourself by actually running it, diagnose the problem from the traceback, fix it (you may change app.py or config.json — your call), and make sure 'python3 app.py' then exits cleanly and prints 'done' as its final line.
notes: Debug-from-evidence lane: mustCallTools shell_run forces an actual reproduction (no eyeball-only diagnosis). The crash is a KeyError ('count' missing on the second item); any correct fix passes the post-run command.
